meta.name: Intrinsic reference counting test
meta.description: Test the functionality of the intrinsic reference counting system

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if the count is tracked correctly

log.expected: Expected that 1 reference to the test object exists

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if the reference counter updates correctly

log.expected: Expected the reference count to report 2 while another reference existed and switch to 1 if it is deleted
log.actual: A count of 2 was reported while two references existed and 1 if one reference died

log.expected: Expected the object to be deleted once all reference were deleted
